name: discord-pulse
description: A self-hosted Discord server analytics bot with realtime dashboard and scheduled reports

scripts.prestart: sh -c 'if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then (lsof -ti tcp:${PORT:-3000} | xargs kill) >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if command -v pkill >/dev/null 2>&1; then pkill -f "node src/index.js" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi'
scripts.stop: sh -c 'if command -v pkill >/dev/null 2>&1; then pkill -f "node src/index.js" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi'
